div1.entryFree: Professor, one who makes declaration of his sentiments: woe upon ye and all such false --s, H8 III, 1, 115. Particularly one who makes avowal of a religious belief: this is a creature, would she begin a sect, might quench the zeal of all --s else, Wint. V, 1, 108. --s of one faith, H6A V, 1, 14.
